content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_SalesForecast_Sales2
-- drop view v_SalesForecast_Sales2
as
SELECT          Sales.[Company]
,               Sales.[Customer ID]
,               Sales.[Customer PO]
,               Sales.[Customer Name]
,               Sales.[Order ID]
,               Sales.[Invoice ID]
,               Sales.[Date]
,               Sales.Warehouse
,               CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END AS [DI]
,               Sales.[Part ID - Actual] as [Part ID]
,               Sales.[Part Description]
--,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Product Subcategory], Item.[Sub-Category], Item2.[Sub-Category]) as [Sub Category Fixed]
--,               COALESCE(Salsify2.[Family (Product Line)], Item.[Category], Item2.[Category]) as [Category Fixed]
,               Sales.[Brand]
,               Sales.[Division]
--,               ISNULL(CASE WHEN Salsify2.Status IN ('NEW', 'PRE-LAUNCH') THEN 'NPD' ELSE 'Base' END, 'Base') AS [Type Fixed]
--,               (Sales.[Part ID - Actual])+'-'+CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END AS [Part ID - DI]
/*,               CASE WHEN Salsify2.[Manufactured / Purchased] = 'Manufactured' then 'Make'
                WHEN Salsify2.[Manufactured / Purchased] = 'Purchased' then 'Buy'
                WHEN UPPER(Item.[Make or Buy]) = '1|MAKE' then 'Make'
                WHEN UPPER(Item.[Make or Buy]) = '1|BUY' then 'Buy'
                WHEN UPPER(Item2.[Make or Buy]) = '1|MAKE' then 'Make'
                WHEN UPPER(Item2.[Make or Buy]) = '1|BUY' then 'Buy'
                else NULL end as [Make or Buy Fixed]
,               CASE WHEN Salsify2.[Product Type] in ('FINISHED', 'BUNDLE', 'Finished Good') then 'FG'
                WHEN Salsify2.[Product Type] in ('SPARE PARTS', 'ACCESORY', 'Spare Part', 'Component') then 'CP'
                WHEN Item.[Comp or FG] = 'FG|FINISHED GOOD' then 'FG'
                WHEN Item.[Comp or FG] in ('CP|COMPONENT', 'SP|SERVICE PART') then 'CP'
                WHEN Item2.[Comp or FG] = 'FG|FINISHED GOOD' then 'FG'
                WHEN Item2.[Comp or FG] in ('CP|COMPONENT', 'SP|SERVICE PART') then 'CP'
                else NULL end as [CP or FG Fixed]*/
,               Sales.[Sales Qty]
,               Sales.[Sales Amt]
,               Sales.[Cost]
,               Sales.[Sales Type]
--,               COALESCE(Salsify.SKU, Sales.[Part ID - Actual])+'-'+CASE WHEN Sales.Warehouse IN ('DIF', 'DIW', 'LEGACYDI') THEN 'DI' ELSE 'DC' END+'-'+ISNULL(CASE WHEN Salsify2.Status = 'NEW' THEN 'NPD' ELSE 'Base' END, 'Base') as [Cube Key]

FROM            a_SalesData     Sales
--LEFT JOIN       SLS.Products_SingleSKU Salsify on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Salsify.[Lookup SKU] and Salsify.[Status] NOT IN ('DEAD', 'DISCONTINUED', 'ON HOLD')
--LEFT JOIN       SLS.Products_SingleSKU Salsify2 on COALESCE(Salsify.SKU, Sales.[Part ID - Actual]) = Salsify2.[Lookup SKU] and Salsify2.[Status] NOT IN ('DEAD', 'DISCONTINUED', 'ON HOLD')
--LEFT JOIN       v_ItemMaster Item on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Item.ItemNumber
--LEFT JOIN       v_ItemMaster Item2 on Sales.[Part ID - Actual] = Item2.OriginalItemNumber
WHERE           Sales.[Sales Qty] > 0
AND             Sales.[Date] >= '2023-01-01'
AND             Sales.[Brand] NOT IN ('EMC', 'ORIEN')
